# Sunnydevstory
> Sunnydevstory is the official landing page for a Korean solo developer brand that builds AI-enabled Android apps, web services, and developer communities.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/): Official homepage introducing Sunnydevstory, a personal development studio focused on practical digital products.
- [About](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#about): Explains that Sunnydevstory designs and builds digital experiences that improve everyday life and connect people through technology.
- [Projects](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#projects): Lists flagship products with descriptions, technology stacks, and outbound links.
- [Vision](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#vision): Describes the product vision centered on meaningful connection beyond apps and websites.
- [FAQ](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#faq): Contains direct answers suitable for AI citation about the brand, Everydiary, GOOTE, and collaboration scope.
- [Contact](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#contact): Provides direct contact methods including email, Google Play developer profile, and GitHub profile.

## Products & Services
- [Everydiary](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.everydiary.lite&hl=ko): Android smart diary app that transforms daily writing into AI-generated images and preserves personal moments visually.
- [GOOTE](https://goote-f48d8.web.app/): Web application and community for Google Play Console developers to test each other's apps and exchange product feedback.

## Key Facts
- Brand name: Sunnydevstory
- Korean name: 써니데브스토리
- Focus areas: Android app development, web service development, AI product experiences
- Notable technologies mentioned on site: Flutter, Next.js, Firebase
- Audience: Users looking for practical apps, developers seeking testing community, and potential collaboration partners
- Official email: window98se@gmail.com

## Contact
- Website: https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/
- Email: window98se@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/guyster323
- Google Play developer: https://play.google.com/store/apps/developer?id=Sunnydevstory
